channel.title: Sustainability on Aviral Agarwal
channel.description: Recent content in Sustainability on Aviral Agarwal

item.title: CARMA - Startup Simulation Project
item.description:
Overview

Spearheaded a six-month startup incubation project with a team of five to develop a carbon management app, overseeing program management, team onboarding, milestone tracking, and resource allocation while implementing incentives through discounts and gamification.

Outreach

Presented the concept at TreeHacks 2023 and the Stanford Graduate School of Business Ignite Program in 2023.

item.title: Life Cycle Assessment of Geothermal Energy for Data Centers
item.description:
Overview

Analyzed the environmental and economic viability of geothermal energy for data centers. Conducted a comparative analysis between electricity from the grid and geothermal energy along with a waste recovery system, and presented a poster with findings and recommendations.

item.title: Sustainable Energy Model for 2050
item.description:
Overview

Built a scoping framework that involved reviewing the current energy mix, policies, and potential for future technologies across countries to develop a scenario for creating a sustainable energy system for 9 billion people in 2050 in accordance with meeting Paris Agreement targets.
